# S0 PR Template

## Stage overview

Stage `S0` covers Phase 8 contracts and ingestion foundations. Use this template when the PR changes envelope contracts, ingest normalization, raw inbox behavior, or other ingestion-side invariants. Keep protected paths and byte-locks explicit in the scope section before review starts.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The PR closes the intended `P8-` tasks for Stage `S0`.
- [ ] Contract or ingestion behavior matches the approved brief exactly.
- [ ] Any byte-locked paths are either untouched or explicitly reopened by the brief.
- [ ] The final commit title and body follow the Phase 8 commit mapping convention.
- [ ] The Notion row can map to the final verified or SEAL commit without ambiguity.

## Scope - files touched + byte-locks

- Files touched:
  - `{{path}}`
  - `{{path}}`
- Byte-locked / forbidden paths checked:
  - `{{path or command}}`
  - `{{path or command}}`
- Brief: `{{docs/briefs/YYYY-MM-DD-batchXX-slug.md}}`

## Testing - what must pass before merge

- `set -o pipefail; npm run build`
- `set -o pipefail; npm test`
- `{{focused grep, diff, or fixture check from the brief}}`

## Rollback - how to revert if needed

- Revert the PR or final SEAL commit.
- Restore the previous contract or ingestion behavior from the last verified commit.
- Re-run the Stage `S0` verification commands before reopening follow-up work.
